title: MEWP Operator Refresher
description: Refresher training for operators of mobile elevated work platforms. Covers pre-use checks, safe operation procedures, and emergency protocols. Required every three years for certificated operators.

title: Health & Safety Awareness
description: Introductory course covering key health and safety legislation, workplace hazard identification, risk assessment principles, and personal responsibilities under HSWA 1974.

title: First Aid at Work
description: Three-day certificated first aid course covering CPR, AED use, bleeding control, fractures, burns, and emergency scene management. Meets HSE requirements for workplace first aiders.

title: MBA Foundation
description: Part-time MBA foundation module covering strategic management, organisational behaviour, and financial principles for public sector leaders. Awarded by partnering university.

title: Presentation Skills
description: Practical workshop developing confidence and technique for formal presentations. Covers structure, visual aids, handling questions, and managing nerves. Includes video review session.

title: Project Management Fundamentals
description: Introduction to structured project management using PRINCE2 principles. Covers project lifecycle, business case, risk management, and stakeholder communication. Preparation for PRINCE2 Foundation examination.

title: Leadership Essentials
description: Core leadership development programme for people managers and emerging leaders. Topics include situational leadership, performance conversations, team motivation, and change management.

title: Data Protection & GDPR Awareness
description: Mandatory awareness training covering UK GDPR principles, lawful basis for processing, data subject rights, and obligations for staff handling personal data. Annual refresh required.

title: Fire Warden Training
description: Half-day course for designated fire wardens covering fire prevention, evacuation procedures, fire extinguisher use, and warden responsibilities under the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005.

title: Coaching and Mentoring
description: ILM Level 5 Award in Coaching and Mentoring. Develops skills for structured one-to-one coaching and mentoring relationships. Suitable for managers supporting direct report development.

title: Excel for Analysts
description: Intermediate Excel training focused on data analysis workflows. Covers PivotTables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, conditional formatting, Power Query basics, and charting for reporting purposes.

title: Conflict Resolution
description: Workshop on managing workplace conflict using mediation principles and structured conversation techniques. Covers conflict escalation models, active listening, and de-escalation strategies for managers.

title: Asbestos Awareness
description: Category A awareness training under the Control of Asbestos Regulations 2012. Covers identification of asbestos-containing materials, health risks, and duty to manage. Mandatory for staff likely to encounter asbestos.

title: Manual Handling Operations
description: Practical training covering safe manual handling techniques, risk assessment under the Manual Handling Operations Regulations 1992, and ergonomic principles for reducing musculoskeletal injury.

title: Electrical Safety Awareness
description: Awareness-level training on electrical hazards in the workplace, safe isolation procedures, and recognition of unsafe electrical equipment. Non-practical; does not confer any electrical competence.

title: Working at Height
description: Practical safety training covering the Work at Height Regulations 2005, risk assessment, equipment inspection, and safe use of ladders, scaffolding, and mobile towers.

title: Equality, Diversity & Inclusion
description: Mandatory awareness course covering the Equality Act 2010, protected characteristics, unconscious bias, and inclusive behaviours in the public sector workplace.

title: Public Sector Finance Awareness
description: Overview of public sector financial management principles including budget cycles, spending controls, value for money, and accountability frameworks relevant to UK government organisations.

title: Procurement and Contract Management
description: Foundation training in public procurement rules, tender processes, supplier evaluation, and contract management obligations under the Procurement Act 2023.

title: Cybersecurity Awareness
description: Annual mandatory cybersecurity awareness training covering phishing identification, password hygiene, secure data handling, and incident reporting procedures aligned to NCSC guidance.

title: Python for Data Analysis
description: Practical Python programming course for data analysis. Covers pandas, numpy, matplotlib, and Jupyter notebooks. Assumes no prior Python knowledge. Suitable for analysts transitioning from Excel.

title: GIS and Mapping for Operations
description: Introduction to geographic information systems for operational planning. Covers spatial data concepts, ArcGIS Online, asset mapping, and route planning applications.

title: CMMS / Asset Management Systems
description: Practical training on computerised maintenance management systems. Covers work order creation, preventive maintenance scheduling, asset register management, and reporting. System-agnostic principles with Maximo examples.

title: Business Process Analysis
description: Introduction to process mapping, analysis, and improvement techniques. Covers swimlane diagrams, value stream mapping, root cause analysis, and basic Lean principles for public sector processes.

title: Stakeholder Management
description: Workshop covering stakeholder identification, analysis, and engagement planning. Includes influence-interest mapping, communication strategy, and managing difficult stakeholder relationships in complex public sector environments.

title: Professional Writing Skills
description: Practical course on clear, concise professional writing for public sector contexts. Covers briefing notes, business cases, emails, and reports. Includes plain English principles and accessibility guidance.

title: Time Management and Prioritisation
description: Workshop on personal productivity techniques. Covers workload prioritisation frameworks, managing competing demands, meeting effectiveness, and digital tool habits for knowledge workers.

title: Change Management Practitioner
description: APMG Change Management Practitioner qualification. Covers change models, stakeholder engagement, resistance management, and sustaining change. Requires Foundation as prerequisite.

title: HR for Line Managers
description: Practical guidance for line managers on employment law basics, disciplinary and grievance processes, absence management, performance management, and recruitment responsibilities.

title: Business Case Development
description: HM Treasury Five Case Model for business case development. Covers strategic, economic, commercial, financial, and management cases with worked examples from infrastructure and public service contexts.

title: AAT Level 3 Certificate in Accounting
description: AAT Level 3 qualification providing foundation accounting skills covering double-entry bookkeeping, VAT, costing, and management accounting. Evening study with exam-based assessment.

title: CIPD Associate Diploma in People Management
description: CIPD Level 5 Associate Diploma covering employment relations, talent management, reward, and diversity. Blended learning with workplace assessment components. Professional HR qualification.

title: Engineering Council UK-SPEC Competence Review
description: Supported self-assessment and competence portfolio development for engineers seeking professional registration (IEng/CEng). Includes mentor matching and competence mapping workshop.

title: Data Dashboards and Visualisation
description: Practical course on creating effective management dashboards using Power BI. Covers data modelling, DAX basics, visual selection, and publishing to Power BI Service for shared reporting.

title: Wellbeing and Resilience at Work
description: Workshop on recognising and managing workplace stress, building personal resilience, and supporting team wellbeing. Covers NHS Five Ways to Wellbeing and line manager obligations under the Health and Safety at Work Act.
